inputTitle: Paste a draft, caption, script, or article
inputDescription: The browser turns raw text into a live writing dashboard. No upload step, no server round-trip.
placeholder: Start with a paragraph, a product description, meeting notes, or a full article…
snapshotDescription: Core volume metrics for word limits, reading time, and publishing targets.
styleDescription: Signals that tell you how dense, varied, or repetitive the writing feels.
structureDescription: Useful when you want shorter paragraphs, tighter sentences, or a faster skim.
repeatedTermsDescription: Fast way to catch words that dominate the page before they start sounding mechanical.
repeatedTermsEmpty: No repeated terms yet. Add more text and repeated vocabulary will show up here.
